name: Carrot Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg yolks with the sugar until light.
2. Add the grated carrots, shredded apple, wine, lemon juice, and lemon rind. Mix in the potato starch well.
3. In another bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff. Fold them into the yolk mixture.
4. Turn the batter into a well-greased 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Bake for 35 minutes in a preheated 375°F oven or until nicely puffed and set.
6. Serve hot or cold.
Serves 6
I have not tried this, but it sounded like a good side dish, that is not too heavy.
